parameters.query:
WITH team_ids AS (
  SELECT id, external_id FROM wcic.teams
  WHERE external_id = $4
),
player_ids AS (
  SELECT id, external_id FROM wcic.players
  WHERE external_id = $5 OR external_id = $6
)
INSERT INTO wcic.match_events (
  match_id, external_id, event_type, minute, extra_minute,
  period, team_id, player_id, assist_player_id,
  is_confirmed, raw_payload, created_at
)
SELECT
  $1::uuid,
  $2,
  $3::wcic.event_type,
  $7::smallint,
  $8::smallint,
  $9,
  (SELECT id FROM team_ids LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT id FROM player_ids WHERE external_id = $5 LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT id FROM player_ids WHERE external_id = $6 LIMIT 1),
  true,
  $10::jsonb,
  NOW()
ON CONFLICT (match_id, external_id)
WHERE external_id IS NOT NULL
DO NOTHING
RETURNING id::text, match_id::text, event_type, minute, external_id;

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ match_id: $('Expand Events').item.json.matchId, event_type: $('Expand Events').item.json.event_type, minute: $('Expand Events').item.json.minute, external_id: $('Expand Events').item.json.external_id, correlation_id: $('Expand Events').item.json.correlationId, home_score: $('Expand Events').item.json.homeScore, away_score: $('Expand Events').item.json.awayScore, ts: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  m.id::text AS match_id,
  ht.name AS home_team, ht.short_name AS home_code,
  at.name AS away_team, at.short_name AS away_code,
  v.name AS venue_name,
  m.home_score, m.away_score
FROM wcic.matches m
JOIN wcic.teams ht ON ht.id = m.home_team_id
JOIN wcic.teams at ON at.id = m.away_team_id
LEFT JOIN wcic.venues v ON v.id = m.venue_id
WHERE m.id = $1::uuid
LIMIT 1;

additionalFields.queryParams:
={{ [
  $('Init').first().json.executionId,
  $('Init').first().json.startedAt,
  $('Init').first().json.correlationId,
  $('Check Active Matches').first().json.activeCount || 0,
  JSON.stringify({ active_matches: $('Check Active Matches').first().json.activeCount || 0 })
] }}
